channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: $100,000 invested 5 years ago in Ethereum $ETH is worth $85,000 today. $100,000 invested 5 years ago in Nvidia $NVDA is worth $1,400,000 today. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBJd3ZYN2VJNFBXRnU1VkZQdE1uRXlDMjFLbjRoV2tlVW9Hd2g5MVRtcDNCeFNxM2dCOGlUTUNLeU1qUk8wVkctRkh5ck9JOG1KcV9LRTBKYkt6Y3J5OEM4dGR3?oc=5" target="_blank">$100,000 invested 5 years ago in E…

item.title: Bitcoin shorts create $1.4B liquidation risk: Is a price squeeze to $80K next?
item.description: Bitcoin failed to overcome $79,000, but a potential bear trap formed as $1.4 billion in short positions face liquidation at $80,000. Will spot market demand be the trigger?

item.title: Ether triple top strikes at $2.4K as ETH analysts doubt bullish trend change
item.description: Ether charts flash an ominous triple-top pattern as ETH fails to overcome $2,400. Will bears maintain control over the altcoin’s price action?

item.title: Israeli regulators approve shekel-pegged stablecoin
item.description: The approval of the BILS stablecoin issued by Israeli exchange Bits of Gold came after a two-year pilot program on the Solana blockchain.

item.title: Elon Musk’s Fight With Colorado Over AI Law Hits Pause as State Considers Revisions
item.description: The joint motion halts deadlines and enforcement in xAI’s lawsuit while Colorado lawmakers weigh changes to the state’s AI bias law.

item.title: Canada advances bill to ban crypto political donations
item.description: Lawmakers look to push election reform that would block crypto campaign donations, even as Canada expands oversight of stablecoins and digital asset markets.

item.title: Bitcoin whale holdings hit five-month high: Is BTC headed to $80K next?
item.description: Bitcoin accumulation by whales and institutional investors is reducing the available supply of BTC and potentially setting the stage for a rally above $80,000.

item.title: 🇺🇸 BIG: White House crypto advisor Patrick Witt says a “big announcement” on Trump’s Bitcoin reserve is coming within weeks. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE9vRUZOcnJ6RlkwQ184b2NrQ0VpTGVSY3dWR1Rpc3F2NnlCbm1Gc3dnRXVzNHJKZWNLYWhFNFJEMUQxaTRyb0s3YWhhclhRUV9WdnQzVm5ZcU4zRWRQR18zdjRNdDk?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 BIG: White House crypto ad…

item.title: Industry leaders are pouring hundreds of millions into a rescue plan for Aave users after massive crypto hack
item.description: The response to the DeFi recovery fund has quickly extended beyond Aave, and in some cases began with direct outreach.

item.title: Tennessee crypto kiosk ban set to go into effect July 1
item.description: Crypto ATM operators and businesses hosting the machines have until July 1 to be in compliance with the new law or risk potential fines and prison time.

item.title: Bitcoin rally shows signs of fatigue as key indicators turn bearish
item.description: Cooling U.S. demand, elevated Bitfinex whale positioning and a key on chain rejection point to short term downside during the Las Vegas Bitcoin conference.

item.title: Aave-Led 'DeFi United' Relief Effort Raises $300 Million to Cover Kelp DAO Exploit Losses
item.description: The Aave-led relief effort has gained widespread support, securing enough commitments to replenish the swiped funds.

item.title: OpenAI Is Building Its Own Smartphone Chip With Qualcomm and MediaTek: Report
item.description: Six weeks after telling staff to stop chasing distractions, OpenAI is reportedly planning a phone targeting 400 million units a year.

item.title: Western Union eyeing stablecoin launch to settle global transactions without SWIFT, CEO says
item.description: The 175-year-old money-transfer firm also plans to issue a stablecoin-linked card for payments and cash-out options from crypto to local currencies, CEO Devin McGranahan said.

item.title: Bitcoin Developer Plans to 'Reassign' Coins Linked to Satoshi Nakamoto in Hard Fork
item.description: Paul Sztorc’s proposed eCash fork would give investors coins cloned from wallets believed to belong to Bitcoin creator Satoshi Nakamoto.

item.title: Taylor Swift Seeks Trademarks for Her Voice and Image to Fight AI Fakes
item.description: The trademark applications aim to strengthen her ability to fight AI-generated deepfakes, as image generation tools advance.

item.title: Price predictions 4/27: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin fails to top $80,000 as analysts debate whether BTC has truly changed its trend or remains in the grasp of the bears.

item.title: Fed Confirms What Tech Developers Have Feared for Two Years
item.description: A new Federal Reserve study links ChatGPT's launch to a sharp halving of U.S. programmer job growth—the first institutional-level evidence connecting AI adoption to measurable developer hiring declines.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC Chair Paul Atkins says crypto & blockchain innovation will "strengthen" the US economy and financial system. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5QT1IyWjhPbXJfRWx2VWFSZFAyekEwWXJOb3lPZ2VSZVFJWFNocnBER01ndm9zR2xDQVRHX01heno0NHEtS19SOFl2OGcwcTBhT2NSS2VUNmZiQkttQkoydDBR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 SEC Chair Paul Atkin…

item.title: BitMine acquires 101,000 ETH despite $6.5B in unrealized losses
item.description: The crypto treasury company continues to buy Ether and earn staking rewards, even as price swings leave billions in unrealized losses on its balance sheet.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senator Cynthia Lummis says crypto market structure legislation will get to the "finish line" in May. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFBaSEQyRlFHcXFzekVQR3VjcTA5ekFTeGg2bFJGRFBNOV9xZ3I4WlRXVEs0QzZ0azdubHFGNkRPRkpzNWFHcko1ZFcwbnZoYVkzQmxYcEt0elhGWTdrcmwtOTB3?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 Senator Cynthia Lumm…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senator Cynthia Lummis announces Bitcoin and crypto market structure legislation will get marked up "in May." 👀 "We are gonna get it to the finish line." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBpcDcxSHNjTFotVjNHUThNemFlaloteHNiWmhWZEpPcGdWS0lDNWZWYmVLc0FWXzRJNjFEOWx2cjh5Y1R1WlZKMTM2ak9RSmxtc2Zucm51M2lRLW1uRDJwemVxTWJDTUE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senator Cy…

item.title: EU sanctions target Russian crypto exchanges, stablecoins and CBDC
item.description: The European Commission made its move in response to Russia's increasing reliance on crypto transactions to circumvent sanctions amid the country's war on Ukraine.

item.title: Bitcoin price slips under $77K as bulls battle for new 'macro-bullish shift'
item.description: Bitcoin bulls struggled to maintain gains as the bull market support band became a key reclaim level to flip the BTC price trend.

item.title: OFAC Updates Central Bank of Iran Designation Following Record $344 Million Tether Seizure amid Strait of Hormuz Toll Controversy
item.description: On April 24, 2026, the U.S. Department of the Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) updated its designation of… The post OFAC Updates Central Bank of Iran Designation Following Record $344 Million Tether Seizure amid Strait of…

item.title: Malicious Web Pages Are Hijacking AI Agents, And Some Are Going After Your PayPal
item.description: Google's security team scanned billions of web pages and found real payloads designed to trick AI agents into sending money, deleting files, and leaking credentials.

item.title: T Rowe Active Crypto ETF filing with 3rd amendment. Ticker $TOKN, fee 75bps. Launch likely very soon. The reason this one is notable imo is because it’s by far biggest active manager to apply their active prowess to this space. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE04ZDl4N0dSbVVzNEJuVlBsWE1KV1VTS0VnNmRrT2FpcjZNbk5ZdzV3Zkp3d1h5bmJXcklqWmZ0VlhIbE9CMENRSWZYSkxOMURsbG4wX09JTnM3TXdDWTY3c3EwNUU?oc=5" target="_blank">T Rowe Active Crypto ETF filing…

item.title: MARA Holdings targets bitcoin quantum threat and network resilience with new foundation
item.description: Bitcoin's future is not guaranteed, said CEO Fred Thiel at the Bitcoin Conference in Las Vegas.

item.title: Google Employees Demand CEO Block Military AI Contracts in Open Letter
item.description: Some 580 Google employees have signed the letter to CEO Sundar Pichai, citing ethical concerns over military use of AI.

item.title: Publicly Traded Strive Buys $60 Million in Bitcoin, Plans BTC Business Summit
item.description: Strive Inc. purchased 789 more Bitcoin while its subsidiary prepares to educate business leaders on corporate crypto adoption.

item.title: Bitcoin pulls back to $76,600 as rising oil price and Iran risks stall the rally
item.description: Short-term holder profit-taking is offsetting fresh demand from ETFs and Strategy, pointing to consolidation below $80,000, Bitfinex analysts said.

item.title: Trump Walks Back Prediction Market Criticism, Says 'Smart People' He Knows Like Them
item.description: Trump said last week he didn’t like prediction markets, but then changed his tune, arguing the U.S. should not get left behind in the space.

item.title: Bernstein sees IREN pivoting from Bitcoin mining to $3.7B AI cloud business
item.description: As Bitcoin miner IREN shifts toward AI cloud infrastructure, leveraging a Microsoft deal and GPU expansion, analysts expect mining revenue to decline over time.

item.title: Crypto Exchange Gemini Launches Agentic Trading Feature for AI Agents
item.description: Gemini has integrated AI models like Claude and ChatGPT to execute automated trading strategies via an open protocol.

item.title: Litecoin Rewrites Transaction History After Exploit, Apologizes for Social Posts
item.description: Litecoin was affected by a bug this weekend that allowed an attacker to transfer digital assets—transactions that were later wiped away.

item.title: Curve founder pitches market-based fix for $700K bad debt in contrast to Aave bailout
item.description: The plan allows trapped lenders to sell tokenized claims on deposits, offering buyers an option-like bet on CRV's recovery.

item.title: Solana developers outline plan to protect network from quantum threats
item.description: Two of the network’s core developer teams, Anza and Jump Crypto’s Firedancer, have landed on the same solution: a new type of digital signature called Falcon.

item.title: Bitcoin is climbing on thin volume, leaving rally vulnerable to macro shock
item.description: Low trading volume and a lack of conviction from big-money bettors could leave the bitcoin rally on shaky ground, said 10x Research head Markus Thielen.

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman Apologizes for Not Alerting Police Before Tumbler Ridge Mass Shooting
item.description: Sam Altman admitted that OpenAI should have warned law enforcement after banning the suspect’s account months before the attack.

item.title: Cross-border B2B stablecoin payments to hit $5 trillion by 2035, says Juniper Research
item.description: Juniper Research found that 85% of all stablecoin transaction value in 2035 will be driven by international business-to-business (B2B) payments.

item.title: Gemini Launches AI “Agentic Trading” for Automated Crypto Accounts Gemini has introduced “Agentic Trading,” allowing users to connect AI models such as ChatGPT and Claude directly to trading accounts via the MCP open standard. The tool enables AI to a - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9pQmw3bk9DVXI5RGo2RFBPbkN1bW1oc0xwZ3BwTXlfc2pXNzJxbVhITk9hVlBlWWMxVG5vNEM3Wk1vWXNiUmFHcXJ5Y1ZoZDRtNFR0MnJ4bmc5RlJRSWRMaTNSVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Gemini Launches AI “Agentic Trad…

item.title: Fidelity Digital Assets says bitcoin is leading crypto market stabilization
item.description: Despite muted prices to start the second quarter, the report said improving onchain metrics and network activity point to a market finding its footing.

item.title: China Blocks Meta's $2 Billion Acquisition of AI Startup Manus
item.description: Beijing's intervention in Meta's startup acquisition signals tighter scrutiny of foreign investments in China's AI sector.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin erases gains from yesterday, falling back under $77,000. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE1QczRmRXVlbUlyRHBReTlJdmRSQXZGa0xpY3hLcDE0Zi1CYlJYRDFSRVdKVXA3emx2NU9wX3lMc0tCZmQ3aHA4LTZsRjNDTkhGT0tKQWZwTEhrWVVHeFJNNmdR?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin erases gains from…

item.title: Canada’s crypto donation ban clears key vote with support from Conservatives
item.description: Bill C-25, the Strong and Free Elections Act, cleared second reading Friday and heads to committee as Conservative lawmakers raise but don’t challenge the proposed ban on bitcoin contributions

item.title: Microsoft and OpenAI Rework AI Deal, Cutting Exclusivity and AGI Provisions
item.description: The restructured deal with Microsoft removes exclusivity provisions and revenue-sharing arrangements, freeing OpenAI to pursue additional allies.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: As the bitcoin price rises, futures may look bearish, but they're not, analyst says
item.description: Research firm 10x says the negative funding rates reflect structural hedging by institutions, not a broad bearish play.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Makes Biggest Ethereum Buy So Far in 2026, Hitting 5 Million ETH Milestone
item.description: BitMine Immersion Technologies now holds over 5 million ETH, following the leading Ethereum treasury firm's biggest buy since December.

item.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy adds 3.2K Bitcoin at nearly $78K per BTC
item.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy bought 3,273 Bitcoin for $255 million between April 20 and 26, bringing total holdings to 818,334 BTC.

item.title: Bitcoin Giant Strategy's Buying Pace Falls 91% Amid STRC Cooldown
item.description: The Bitcoin-buying firm leaned on common shares to grow its holdings after STRC powered its largest purchase in 16 months.

item.title: Ethereum’s EEZ could pull other blockchains into its orbit
item.description: The Ethereum Economic Zone aims to unify fragmented rollups, but its broader goal is to extend interoperability to other blockchains, says Ernst.

item.title: Solana’s Quantum Readiness
item.description: Where Solana’s quantum readiness stands and the path forward, with independent research from Firedancer and Anza

item.title: MiCA has made euro stablecoins safe but weak, new report argues
item.description: A new Blockchain for Europe report says MiCA has made euro stablecoins safer but less competitive, and urges targeted reforms to reserves and remuneration.

item.title: Signal in the age of infinite noise
item.description: The anonymous person behind the popular X account, SightBringer, explains his take on the most valuable and least understood asset of the market.

item.title: Michael Saylor’s Strategy buys 3,273 bitcoin as it inches closer to its 1 million target
item.description: Strategy, the largest corporate holder of bitcoin in the world, now holds 818,334 BTC, which it said it purchased for nearly $62 billion at an average price of roughly $75,537 per token.

item.title: Bitmine buys $236 million in ether as Tom Lee touts ETH as 'wartime store of value'
item.description: The firm has bought more than 5 million in ETH in just 10 months while most digital asset treasury companies have stopped accumulating.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) drops 3.4%, leading index lower
item.description: NEAR Protocol (NEAR), down 2.9%, was also among the underperformers.

item.title: Money Launderer Sentenced to 70 Months Over $263M Crypto Social-Engineering Scheme
item.description: California money launderer Evan Tangeman admitted to having processed millions in stolen cryptocurrency proceeds.

item.title: Leading Ethereum stewards @Consensys and @ethereumJoseph have joined DeFi United with up to 30,000 ETH in financial support for the rsETH recovery effort, with ongoing strategic advisory from @Sharplink. Their contributions are a substantial compone - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE1NeU9pcWxjU20tbVY0R1pmNlBBSGF3b3FOUEQySWpjQURYYXg3eEs4WFpQLW1uMm5xUVRWVmZYbUNHQzZTZGtiTkN0cTFqV3B0aG0wanRrSGg?oc=5" target="_blank">Leading Ethereum stewards @Consensys and @ether…
